name: Peppermint Fudge Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, sugar, butter, and salt in a pot.
2. Bring to a full boil over medium heat.
3. Continue boiling for an additional 5 minutes while stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat and add marshmallows, chocolate chips, peppermint extract, and chopped walnuts.
5. Stir vigorously until the marshmallows are melted and well blended.
6. Pour into an 8-inch square pan.
7. Chill until set. Makes about 2 pounds.
Origin: My Mom, Shirley Whittaker, Richmond B.C., Canada. Shared by: Sharon Stevens Oct/91
